critical_issues.title: Failure alert fires on every evaluation cycle due to wrong timeAggregation
critical_issues.description: Using timeAggregation:'Count' against a summarize count() query always emits one result row (count=1). The alert engine counts rows (=1) rather than the FailedRuns value, so 1 > 0 fires permanently. Fix: change timeAggregation to 'Total' so the engine sums the FailedRuns column value.
critical_issues.fix_applied: Changed timeAggregation from 'Count' to 'Total' for failureAlert

critical_issues.title: Data quality alert fires on every evaluation cycle due to wrong timeAggregation
critical_issues.description: Identical root cause to CRIT-1. summarize OutOfRangeCount = count() always emits one row; timeAggregation:'Count' counts rows (=1), so 1 > 0 fires permanently. Fix: change timeAggregation to 'Total'.
critical_issues.fix_applied: Changed timeAggregation from 'Count' to 'Total' for dataQualityAlert

suggestions.title: Data-quality query not scoped by cloud_RoleName
suggestions.description: The customMetrics query omits a cloud_RoleName filter, which could cause false positives if the App Insights workspace is ever shared.
suggestions.fix_applied: Added 'where cloud_RoleName == functionAppName' filter to dataQualityAlert query

suggestions.title: No muteActionsDuration — alerts can send emails every 5 minutes during an outage
suggestions.description: All three alerts use evaluationFrequency PT5M with no muteActionsDuration, so up to 12 emails/hour can be sent during a sustained condition.
suggestions.fix_applied: Added muteActionsDuration PT15M for severity-1 failure alert; PT1H for severity-2 duration and data-quality alerts

suggestions.title: Duration alert does not document null-window behaviour
suggestions.description: When no requests arrive in the evaluation window, max(duration) returns null and Azure skips the evaluation. This should be documented.
suggestions.fix_applied: Added inline comment explaining null MaxDuration behaviour for the duration alert

suggestions.title: Inconsistent resource type casing on action group
suggestions.description: Action group used lowercase 'microsoft.insights/actionGroups' while alert rules used PascalCase 'Microsoft.Insights/...'. Should be consistent.
suggestions.fix_applied: Updated action group resource type to 'Microsoft.Insights/actionGroups@2023-01-01'

suggestions.title: alerts.json must be kept in sync with alerts.bicep
suggestions.description: The repo commits both Bicep source and pre-compiled ARM JSON. Future Bicep-only edits could silently diverge from the JSON. Add a CI gate or remove alerts.json from source control.
suggestions.note: No alerts.json file exists in this repository — this concern does not apply.
